name: background-tips
description: Displays tips about Pulsar in the background when there are no editors open.
backgroundTips: You can split your editor into multiple panes with {pane:split-right-and-copy-active-item}
You can move a line of text up with {atom-text-editor>editor:move-line-up}
You can move a line of text down with {atom-text-editor>editor:move-line-down}
You can toggle line comments with {atom-text-editor>editor:toggle-line-comments}

displayDuration.description: How long each tip is displayed, in seconds.

debug.description: Log debug information about tip collection and display to the console.
